target: WIN-034 (Firmament = cast copper/bronze) — verdict reclassification Unfalsifiable → Self-Contradicted (structural-coherence pattern 2). Addresses ISS-1921 (operator-rerouted orphan, holistic class_hint). Three independent SC dimensions on the dome's own commitments: (1) ground-based radio astronomy at copper-opaque frequencies, (2) WIN-048 CMB observability, (3) WIN-029 Schumann frequency (the dome's own H(r)=8537·exp(−r/8619) gives ~0.018 Hz, not the 7.83 Hz the copper-ceiling premise is meant to deliver). Also resolves the WIN-034-Unfalsifiable / WIN-048-SC-cites-WIN-034 latent tension flagged in WIN-048.c4 hole #1 (the source review that raised ISS-1921 via stronger_arguments[1]).
review_class_override_note: class_hint was 'holistic' but the actual scope-of-work is a single-WIN verdict reclassification — same shape as the EXP-295 per-WIN packages, which were treated as deep-attack singletons. The HOLISTIC anchoring is in the *evidence* (cross-WIN dependencies to WIN-029 and WIN-048), but the *patch surface* is single-WIN. Curmudgeon should review as a verdict-change deep-attack singleton (parallel to WIN-048.c4), not as a holistic MOND-grouping batch.

decision.rationale: Option A (reclassify WIN-034 Unfalsifiable → Self-Contradicted on pattern (2) grounds with three named SC dimensions) is correct because: (1) the EXISTING detail_evidence already articulates all three SC arguments verbatim — radio astronomy opacity at 1 GHz (2 μm skin depth), satellite trajectories through claimed firmament, AND the dome's own H(r) giving ~0.018 Hz instead of 7.83 Hz Schumann; the verdict label is being aligned with the prose, not introducing a new framework reading; (2) the latent WIN-034-Unfalsifiable / WIN-048-SC-cites-WIN-034 tension flagged in WIN-048.c4 hole #1 is fully resolved when WIN-034 becomes SC on its own grounds — WIN-048's chain no longer needs the awkward 'Unfalsifiable here, falsifying-premise there' framing; (3) the 'Unfalsifiable' label has always been a slightly forced application: it applies cleanly to direct-material-sampling (we cannot fly to the firmament and chip off a copper sample), but the dome USES WIN-034 as a load-bearing physical commitment elsewhere (Schumann conductive ceiling for WIN-029), and that USE is what makes structural-coherence testing valid. Unfalsifiable-on-its-own-merits and Load-bearing-as-dome-commitment are not mutually exclusive — pattern (2) SC tests the latter.
decision.why_not_option_b: Option B (leave WIN-034 as Unfalsifiable and only add a one-line clarification per WIN-048.c4 hole #1 recommendation (a)) was considered but rejected because: (i) it perpetuates the layered-defender exploit ('your own review classifies WIN-034 as Unfalsifiable; if it is not falsifiable, why are you using it as a falsifying premise?') and forces every future SC-WIN that cross-links to WIN-034 to carry the same clarification; (ii) the prose ALREADY argues SC structurally — leaving the label at 'Unfalsifiable' is the same mismatch EXP-295 corrected for WIN-047/048/052/054/055 (label not matching prose); (iii) the three SC dimensions are independent, well-evidenced in current prose, and pre-rebutted against the metaphorical-defense escape (the dome cannot have WIN-034 be metaphor for radio astronomy and physical for Schumann). Per WIN-048.c4 hole #1, this is explicitly flagged as a 'future curmudgeon spot-check or analyst proposal' — this EXP IS that proposal.
decision.why_not_option_c: Option C (defer until WIN-034 receives its own dedicated curmudgeon C-pass and let that drive the verdict review) was considered but rejected because: (i) WIN-048.c4 IS the curmudgeon source — stronger_arguments[1] explicitly names this proposal; (ii) deferring leaves the latent tension in place across all five EXP-295 reclassifications that cite WIN-034; (iii) the SC argument is already made in current WIN-034 prose; a dedicated WIN-034 C-pass would be re-deriving what is already on the page. Curmudgeon's normal post-integration review (this EXP gets a fresh curmudgeon attack as a deep-attack singleton) provides the adversarial step Option C was seeking.

cross_page_consistency_after_patches: No new cross-page implications. WIN-034's verdict count moves from Unfalsifiable (4 → 3) to Self-Contradicted (19 → 20). Verified against current data/wins.json tally at EXP-author time: {Refuted by Data:11, Self-Contradicted:19, Misleading:16, Std Model Explains:18, Not Demonstrated:3, Unfalsifiable:4} → post-patch {Refuted by Data:11, Self-Contradicted:20, Misleading:16, Std Model Explains:18, Not Demonstrated:3, Unfalsifiable:3}. test.js line 194-204 walks the wins.json verdict tally and confirms each verdict count appears in HTML — the existing HTML legend rows ('N Self-Contradicted', 'M Unfalsifiable', etc.) are generated from wins.json on build, so docs/index.html will pick up the new tally automatically on next build. No hand-rendered count references to 'Unfalsifiable (4)' exist in docs/index.html or data/sections.json (grep verified during EXP draft). The cosmological-cluster section in data/sections.json:part2 currently lists WIN-048 only as a pattern-(2) cross-link to WIN-034; this remains accurate — no section-prose edits required for this EXP. (Optional follow-up: section 2.7 or wherever WIN-034 is first discussed could note the verdict change with a one-line audit-trail, but per EXP-295 minimal-patch philosophy that is out of scope here. Decider may flag for a future EXP if desired.)

holes_addressed.hole: WIN-048.c4 hole #1 (moderate): latent tension — WIN-034 currently Unfalsifiable, but invoked as falsifying premise in WIN-048's SC reading. Curmudgeon recommendation (b): 'Re-examine WIN-034 separately for SC pattern (2) on its own grounds (the dome cannot publish cast copper firmament as conductive-ceiling premise for WIN-029 while simultaneously requiring CMB transparency for WIN-048 — that is a self-contradiction in the dome's commitments, which is exactly SC pattern (2))'. This EXP executes recommendation (b).
holes_addressed.how_addressed: Verdict change to Self-Contradicted with sub_rationale explicitly noting the three dimensions and explicitly stating 'Resolves the WIN-034-Unfalsifiable / WIN-048-SC-cites-WIN-034 latent tension flagged in WIN-048.c4 hole #1'. Future WIN-048 / WIN-029 cross-references no longer need the awkward 'Unfalsifiable here, falsifying-premise there' clarification — both sides are SC on their own grounds.
holes_addressed.defender_test: Defender argues: 'You promoted WIN-034 from Unfalsifiable to SC just so WIN-048's SC chain has cleaner logic — that is goalpost-moving.' Response: The promotion is on three independent dimensions (radio astronomy, CMB, Schumann frequency), each of which would close SC pattern (2) on its own. WIN-048's chain is incidentally cleaned up but the promotion would be warranted with or without WIN-048. The 'Unfalsifiable' label was always a forced application — it applied to direct material-sampling, but the dome's USE of WIN-034 as load-bearing premise has always made structural-coherence testing valid. Aligning the verdict to that fact is correction, not goalpost-moving.

holes_addressed.hole: Implicit hole (pre-existing, not in any current curmudgeon review file): WIN-034's prose argues SC structurally — radio astronomy opacity, satellite trajectories, Schumann frequency mismatch — but the verdict label has been 'Unfalsifiable'. This is the same label/prose mismatch EXP-295 corrected for WIN-047/048/052/054/055.
holes_addressed.how_addressed: Verdict label aligned with prose. No prose-restructuring required (the SC arguments are already present, well-cited, and pre-rebut the metaphorical-defense escape).
holes_addressed.defender_test: Defender argues: 'Now you have over-promoted — WIN-034 is biblical exegesis, which is categorically Unfalsifiable.' Response: The Hebrew etymological claim is theological/unfalsifiable in isolation — agreed. But the dome treats it as a PHYSICAL ENGINEERING SPECIFICATION (cast copper at 8,537 km altitude, conductive ceiling for Schumann WIN-029, etc.). Once adopted as a physical claim, physical falsification applies. The dome cannot simultaneously claim 'WIN-034 is metaphorical' (escape from radio astronomy contradiction) and 'WIN-034 is physical' (provides Schumann conductive ceiling). The closed-dilemma structure is what makes pattern (2) SC apply.

new_evidence_added: Copper skin depth at 160 GHz (CMB peak): δ ≈ √(2/(μ₀σω)) ≈ 0.2 μm for σ_Cu = 5.96×10⁷ S/m at ω = 2π·160×10⁹. (Reference: Pozar, Microwave Engineering, 4e, §1.7; matches WIN-048.c4 review citation.) Already cited in WIN-048's prose post-EXP-295; cross-referenced here in WIN-034.sub_rationale.

Three-dimension independence argument (radio astronomy, CMB observation, Schumann frequency derivation) — synthesizes existing WIN-034 detail_evidence claims, WIN-048 detail_evidence claims, and WIN-029 detail_evidence claims into a single SC pattern (2) reading. No NEW external citations introduced — all referenced facts are already cited in the three respective WIN detail_evidence blocks (radio astronomy: VLA/ALMA/FAST observations, Wikipedia anchor; CMB: Planck PR3/PR4 and WMAP via Land & Magueijo 2005; Schumann: Sentman 1990 and Mushtak & Williams 2002 in WIN-029).

anticipated_objections.objection: Defender pivot 1: 'WIN-034 is biblical exegesis. The Hebrew word raqia is etymologically rooted in r-q-' meaning to beat out (e.g., hammered metal) — modern biblical scholarship (Walton 2009, Genesis 1 as Ancient Cosmology) confirms ancient Hebrews conceived of a solid sky. Calling it Self-Contradicted treats ancient cosmological belief as a modern engineering claim. The label should remain Unfalsifiable because the underlying claim is theological.'
anticipated_objections.response: The kernel of truth here is real — ANE cosmology including ancient Hebrew thought did seem to conceive of a solid firmament (Walton 2009 documents this thoroughly), and the etymology of raqia (Hebrew root r-q-' 'to beat out, hammer') does support a solid-metal reading rather than a metaphor for atmospheric expanse. Engagement with the etymology is correct. BUT the dome model does not stop at 'ancient Hebrews believed in a solid sky' — it adopts that belief as a contemporary physical engineering specification (cast copper at 8,537 km altitude, with thickness profile, conductive properties, and load-bearing structural role in WIN-029's Schumann derivation). Once a claim is adopted as physical engineering, physical falsification applies — this is what separates the dome model from a comparative-religion treatise. The biblical exegesis IS unfalsifiable; the dome's USE of the exegesis as engineering specification is not. SC pattern (2) tests the use, not the etymology.

anticipated_objections.objection: Defender pivot 2: 'You count three SC dimensions but they are not independent — they all derive from the same physical claim (copper firmament). One physical incompatibility plus two consequences of that incompatibility is one SC dimension, not three.'
anticipated_objections.response: The three dimensions are genuinely independent in the sense that each closes SC pattern (2) on a DIFFERENT dome commitment (different WIN, different physical observable). (1) Radio astronomy: dome's commitment to ground-based observations (every dome WIN that cites astronomical evidence — pulsar timing, quasar redshifts, eclipse predictions, etc. — implicitly commits to radio astronomy throughput). (2) WIN-048 CMB observability: dome explicitly cites CMB anomalies as 'confirming evidence' (verbatim in WIN-048 detail_evidence). (3) WIN-029 Schumann frequency: dome explicitly cites 7.83 Hz as a derived prediction from its H(r) — and its own H(r) gives 0.018 Hz. Each WIN/observable is a separate dome commitment; the copper-opacity (or copper-cavity-frequency-derivation) failure is the SAME physical mechanism, but it CLOSES against three different dome positions, each of which the dome cannot abandon without losing other WINs. Even if one accepts the 'single mechanism' framing, the closed-dilemma structure (any branch the dome takes loses a different WIN) is what makes SC pattern (2) apply — that is multiple-dimension.

anticipated_objections.objection: Defender pivot 3: 'The Schumann derivation in WIN-034.detail_evidence assumes the cavity formula applies cleanly to a hemispherical/disc geometry. The dome model has aetheric damping (WIN-002 26% factor) and an exponential H(r) — the proper Schumann calculation for the dome geometry has not been done in the published model. You cannot assert 0.018 Hz vs 7.83 Hz contradiction without the dome's full calculation.'
anticipated_objections.response: The 0.018 Hz figure is a quarter-wave linear-waveguide calculation applied to the dome's stated mean firmament height (~8,500 km). For the dome geometry to yield 7.83 Hz from a 8,537-km-thick cavity, the resonance frequency would need to be ~470× higher than the linear-waveguide estimate — that is not a small correction from geometry or damping, it is a different cavity scale entirely. The actual Schumann cavity is the Earth-ionosphere waveguide (~60–100 km), not an 8,500-km copper shell. WIN-029.detail_evidence already does this calculation in detail (Sentman 1990, Mushtak & Williams 2002 cited there). The dome's 'aetheric damping' free parameter (WIN-002) is exactly the post-hoc rescue device this objection invokes — but introducing a free parameter to recover the right frequency is itself the SC: the parameter exists ONLY to make the wrong cavity scale produce the right number, which is the same pattern (2) failure (commitments forced to be mutually incompatible).

anticipated_objections.objection: Defender pivot 4: 'The dome's copper firmament might be transparent at certain frequencies via a published mechanism not yet documented — perhaps quantum tunneling at GHz scales or selective filtering. Calling it Self-Contradicted assumes the dome's silence on the mechanism is equivalent to commitment to opaque copper.'
anticipated_objections.response: The dome publishes WIN-034 as 'cast copper or bronze' — that IS a commitment to bulk copper with copper's physical properties. There is no published mechanism for selective transparency; quantum tunneling at GHz scales is not a real phenomenon (tunneling rates fall off exponentially with thickness and are negligible at GHz for copper at any visible-laboratory thickness, let alone the firmament's ~8,500 km implied path length). The defender is hypothesizing a new physics module that the dome model does not include. SC pattern (2) tests current published commitments, not hypothetical future physics; if the dome publishes a transparency mechanism in a future revision, that mechanism's compatibility with Schumann conductive-ceiling AND with biblical 'cast metal' etymology would itself need to be defended. As-published the dome is silent, so the default reading (bulk copper with bulk-copper properties) applies.

kernel_of_truth: The dome author has correctly identified a substantive feature of ancient Hebrew cosmology — that the raqia (firmament) in Genesis 1 was conceived as a solid structure in the ANE thought-world, supported by the Hebrew root r-q-' ('to beat out, hammer') and by parallels to Babylonian and Egyptian solid-sky cosmologies. This is not a fringe reading: it is the mainstream view in academic biblical scholarship (e.g., John Walton's The Lost World of Genesis One, 2009; the Jewish Encyclopedia entry on cosmology; the NIV Study Bible's commentary on Genesis 1:6–8). Engagement with the etymology and the comparative ANE cosmology is correct and reflects more careful textual work than most popular treatments. WHY IT DOESN'T SAVE THE CLAIM: ancient cosmological belief about a solid sky is a historical-theological fact about ANE thought; it is not evidence that a solid sky physically exists today. The dome model crosses the categorical boundary when it adopts the ancient belief as a contemporary physical engineering specification — cast copper at specific altitudes, with specific conductive properties, fulfilling specific structural roles (WIN-029 Schumann ceiling) and producing specific predictions. Once crossed, physical falsification applies — and the dome's own commitments (radio astronomy throughput, CMB observability via WIN-048, Schumann 7.83 Hz derivation via WIN-029) close against the physical-copper reading. The dome cannot have both: claim biblical-exegesis status (Unfalsifiable) when challenged on physical grounds, AND claim physical-engineering status (load-bearing for other WINs). Pattern (2) SC tests precisely this kind of incompatibility-of-commitments.
test_recommendation: Add to test.js (after the verdict_history block, around line 332): (a) WIN-034.verdict === 'Self-Contradicted' (canonical sentinel — fails if a future patch silently reverts); (b) WIN-034.finding contains 'pattern 2' OR 'Self-contradiction' (load-bearing finding language); (c) WIN-034.sub_rationale field exists AND contains 'structural-coherence pattern (2)' (parallel to WIN-048's sub_rationale audit-trail). Test scope: WIN-034 only; the broader EXP-295 reclassification suite has its own sentinels per their respective EXP files. Estimated test additions: 3 assert statements, ~6 lines. The decider should apply these as part of the integration commit so the verdict change is regression-protected.
closure_recommendation_for_decider: Apply EXP-383-P1, P2, P3 in order (each is an independent find/replace, but P3 contains the WIN-boundary anchor so it should land last to avoid disrupting subsequent uniqueness checks). After all three patches: (1) re-run JSON.parse on data/wins.json to confirm valid JSON; (2) run tests/run.sh (or node test.js if tests/run.sh is unavailable) and confirm the existing verdict-tally assertion still passes (Self-Contradicted count increments by 1, Unfalsifiable count decrements by 1 — the existing test walks the tally so this is automatic); (3) add the three sentinel asserts from test_recommendation above; (4) commit and push. Then close ISS-1921 with status=fixed, fixed_at=now, notes='WIN-034 reclassified Unfalsifiable → Self-Contradicted per EXP-383; three independent SC pattern (2) dimensions (radio astronomy / WIN-048 CMB / WIN-029 Schumann); resolves WIN-048.c4 hole #1 latent tension.' OPERATOR-APPROVAL GATE: ISS-1921 routing_reason explicitly states 'Analyst drafts EXP; operator approves verdict commit when it lands.' The decider may apply the patches and create the post-integration curmudgeon-queue entry, but should NOT auto-close ISS-1921 — leave at status=fixed-pending-operator-approval (or whichever convention the decider uses for operator-gated verdict commits) until operator confirms via human-note.

scope_note.in_scope: WIN-034 only — verdict, finding, tldr_verdict, sub_rationale fields. The three SC arguments are already in current detail_evidence (radio astronomy skin depth, satellite trajectories, Schumann frequency mismatch); this EXP does NOT restructure detail_evidence.
scope_note.explicitly_out_of_scope: (a) WIN-029 / WIN-048 detail-prose cross-link cleanup. Now that both endpoints of those chains are SC on their own grounds, the current cross-link prose (which carries pre-rebuttals against the WIN-034-Unfalsifiable defender exploit) is over-defensive. A future cleanup EXP can simplify — but this is presentation refinement, not load-bearing. (b) docs/index.html or data/sections.json prose updates — no current section text references WIN-034's verdict label directly (verified by grep during EXP draft). (c) Test additions beyond the three sentinels named above. (d) Cross-WIN audit-trail entries on WIN-029 / WIN-048 noting the new symmetry.
scope_note.rationale_for_narrow_scope: Per EXP-295 minimal-patch philosophy: verdict reclassifications should land with minimal surface area to keep adversarial review focused on the verdict-change argument itself, not on cleanup churn. The over-defensive cross-link prose in WIN-029 / WIN-048 was added DEFENSIVELY against the prior asymmetry (one side SC, other side Unfalsifiable); once the asymmetry is gone, that prose becomes wordy but not wrong. Cleanup is a separate, lower-priority pass.

curmudgeon_review_request: Curmudgeon should attack: (1) the closed-dilemma structure for radio astronomy (are there published transparency mechanisms I should account for in the strongest defender pivot?), (2) the WIN-029-chain robustness (does our chain still hold if WIN-029's own SC reading is itself contested in a future review?), (3) the 'biblical-exegesis as engineering specification' framing — is there a coherent defender position that maintains both biblical-exegesis status AND structural role in WIN-029 without invoking SC pattern (2)? (4) the sub_rationale text's brevity — should it spell out each of the three SC dimensions in more detail, or is the current synthesis-with-pointers sufficient?
